tasks.label: RPi: Deploy GUI
tasks.detail: Push fraiseuse_app.py, motor_controller.py, tool_builder.py et fraiseuse_config.json vers le Pi
tasks.command: scp fraiseuse_app.py motor_controller.py tool_builder.py gpio_learn.py rpi_config/rootfs/home/rpi/fraiseuse_config.json rpi@rpi.local:/home/rpi/ && ssh rpi@rpi.local 'sudo systemctl restart axis-ui.service && echo OK: service redemarré'

tasks.label: RPi: Deploy tool list
tasks.command: scp tool_list.json rpi@rpi.local:/home/rpi/ && echo OK: tool_list.json envoyé

tasks.label: RPi: Deploy config système
tasks.detail: Push boot/config.txt, systemd service, dhcpcd, fstab etc. vers le Pi
tasks.command: scp rpi_config/boot/config.txt rpi@rpi.local:/tmp/config.txt && scp rpi_config/rootfs/etc/systemd/system/axis-ui.service rpi@rpi.local:/tmp/axis-ui.service && scp rpi_config/rootfs/etc/dhcpcd.conf rpi@rpi.local:/tmp/dhcpcd.conf && scp rpi_config/rootfs/etc/fstab rpi@rpi.local:/tmp/fstab && scp rpi_config/rootfs/home/rpi/.xinitrc rpi@rpi.local:/home/rpi/.xinitrc && ssh rpi@rpi.local 'sudo cp /tmp/config.txt /boot/config.txt && sudo cp /tmp/axis-ui.service /etc/systemd/system/axis-ui.service && sudo cp /tmp/dhcpcd.conf /etc/dhcpcd.conf && sudo cp /tmp/fstab /etc/fstab && sudo systemctl daemon-reload && echo OK: config systeme deployee, reboot recommandé'

tasks.label: RPi: GPIO Learn
tasks.detail: Lance gpio_learn.py sur le Pi via SSH (interactif)

tasks.label: RPi: SSH
tasks.detail: Ouvrir une session SSH vers le Pi
